scripts.check: node scripts/check-repo-hygiene.mjs && bun run --cwd services/shared check && bun run --cwd services/contracts check && bun run --cwd services/agent-connector check && bun run --cwd services/community-protocol-issuer check && bun run --cwd services/community-provision-operator check && bun run --cwd services/zkpassport-verifier-container check && bun run --cwd services/api check
scripts.test: bun run --cwd services/api test && bun run --cwd services/agent-connector test && bun run --cwd services/cli test && bun run --cwd services/community-protocol-issuer test && bun run --cwd services/community-provision-operator test && python3 -m unittest discover -s services/community-protocol-prover-runpod -p 'test_*.py'
